local lJnNN1720={221,28,86,106,177,227,7,91,131,138,215,33,14,153,118,239,246,67,141,122,223,41,29,137,163,245,39,75,159,106,3,232,65,121,132,16,49,58,100,155,207,218,101,121,173,255,17,106,175,212,213,17,63,77,215,236,59,83,136,209,220,237,119,148,219,241,50,72,89,227,0,71,93,112,189,39,12,99,153,168,234,250,133,173,226,3,20,93,203,176,7,70,127,128,194,210,93,124,195,231,26,32,65,203,12,53,103,153,222,240,57,84,168,233,196,57,127,163,224,26,61,132,179,228,30,79,100,173,228,19,37,124,181,169,23,90,108,124,241,33,77,129,116,240,31,42,152,155,240,53,99,151,189,185,44,91,102,212,215,44,113,159,141,0,47,58,168,171,0,69,115,97,213,18,64,73,157,146,16,68,88,129,234,200,79,29,167,222,32,0,87,173,221,36,238,56,173,233,35,90,147,195,233,38,94,136,124,254,201,16,68,120,241,36,104,72,209,254,41,2,76,193,0,59,110,92,220,12,49,110,84,117,188,66,36,88,220,19,74,116,118,179,8,0,112,96,148,17,62,131,145,228,13,79,146,176,223,208,82,56,108,160,26,82,137,141,233,43,97,66,116,1,246,64,137,199,237,52,99,72,202,176,228,24,76,207,180,55,28,106,200,11,53,34,149,204,16,68,14,88,140,192,244,124,176,213,196,248,44,96,148,20,72,131,100,231,30,79,125,117,235,0,88,65,179,245,190,8,60,112,164,216,80,64,181,251,31,88,46,120,172,224,20,72,124,212,37,24,149,106,180,232,28,80,132,184,63,84,153,136,169,240,36,88,140,192,56,40,92,144,196,70,44,96,148,13,230,48,100,133,204,68,52,173,234,31,88,127,86,141,32,84,138,191,248,254,87,42,116,233,29,100,137,120,207,37,85,156,102,176,50,108,145,196,8,232,113,149,110,184,45,97,168,220,16,53,104,126,178,20,64,80,170,194,244,250,44,169,227,9,80,132,169,221,26,68,30,104,221,36,56,56,181,169,212,87,60,190,237,194,12,142,189,197,42,102,82,202,237,47,87,157,197,185,228,24,155,128,4,232,101,89,215,12,49,32,84,206,253,52,80,151,173,238,244,40,163,223,19,71,109,180,232,26,252,126,100,152,204,85,131,137,206,36,4,125,108,160,212,87,127,190,247,38,20,64,116,168,46,98,68,120,241,202,20,72,102,176,228,89,144,212,8,232,93,61,132,184,56,108,162,136,16,53,118,157,222,20,57,76,92,215,2
